name: Lewd Forest Exploration // Everything's in heat?
description:
In which you are selected to go map out a forest known for having several 'incidents' involving crossbreeding.

CW: LIKELY RAPE/NONCON AND POSSIBLE FORCED IMPREGNATION

______

"Newbie! That forest won't map itself, you know!"

Taking up a job as a replacement member of the Cartographer's Guild seemed like easy money.

Your job from the boss lady, Claire, was to literally just walk through the forest with a camera she lazily strapped to your forehead and walk around, while it did the rest of the work.

You can't possibly mess this up.

"Ooh, and watch out for the creepy-crawlies, that time of the year when they're in heat is coming up, and they're all riled up... just watch your butt, 'kay?" Claire waved you off with a goofy grin on her face, before returning to the campsite to help set it up. "We'll prep here and wait for you and the others. Buhbye!"

The sun was high and the weather was nice, but it wouldn't last forever. The footpath through the forest seemed to be waiting for you...

_______

Yeah, it's pretty much my forest bot but with way less grit and way more spice.

I also put a bit more work into the funny Ideal Anytime system. A certain someone is no longer a member of Limbus Company, and is now nerfed, nothing more than a regular human.

No more superpowers for you, lil bro...

______

For a brief moment, this bot was on the very front page of the 24-hour trending section. My greatest achievement on this site so far, and it's all thanks to you guys... and Yi Sang.

______

I didn't make the pfp. I unfortunately don't have the image source, because I almost got caught scrolling through Rule 34 looking for it.
